title: Tick Control in Elmont, Long Island | $125 - $325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Elmont, Long Island. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Prices from $125-$325. Same-day service available.
intro: Elmont's leafy residential streets and proximity to parks like Hendrickson Avenue Park make it a wonderful place to live, but they also create ideal habitats for ticks. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services throughout Elmont, protecting your family and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses. Our targeted treatments create a safe barrier around your property while being environmentally conscious.
whyUs: With over 15 years serving Long Island communities, we understand Elmont's unique tick challenges from the backyards near Belmont Park to residential properties along Dutch Broadway. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved treatments and offer flexible scheduling to accommodate busy Elmont families.
localContext: Elmont's tree-lined neighborhoods and well-maintained yards, along with its proximity to green spaces and the Belmont Park area, create environments where ticks thrive in tall grass and shaded areas. Our tick control program is specifically designed for Long Island properties, addressing both deer ticks and dog ticks common to the region.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Elmont?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Elmont range from $125 to $325 depending on your property size and the extent of treatment needed. We provide free inspections and customized quotes for all Elmont properties, with seasonal treatment packages available at discounted rates.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Elmont, Long Island?
faqs.answer: Ticks are active in Elmont from early spring through late fall, with peak activity from April through September. However, during mild winters, ticks can remain active year-round on Long Island. We recommend starting treatments in early spring before tick populations explode and continuing through fall for maximum protection.

faqs.question: Are your tick control treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved tick control products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our certified technicians. We recommend keeping pets and children inside during application and for 2-3 hours afterward until the treatment dries. All our products are specifically chosen for their effectiveness against ticks while minimizing environmental impact.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide tick control service in Elmont?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day tick control services throughout Elmont and surrounding Long Island areas. Our team can typically schedule an inspection within 24 hours and begin treatment immediately if needed. Emergency tick treatments are available for properties with active infestations or recent tick encounters.
